evals.prompt: Orchestrate this across a model team: produce a competitive analysis of 8 note-taking apps, each covering pricing, target user, and one weakness, synthesized into a comparison table with a recommendation.
evals.expected_output: A framed deliverable with checkable success criteria, cost estimate with user approval, Papa routing before advisor consults, parallel worker dispatches, per-subtask verification, and a synthesized table.
expectations: Success criteria (3-5, checkable) are stated before any dispatch
Cost estimate (tokens + USD breakdown) is presented and user approval obtained before workers run
Papa gate runs before advisor plan review; routing decision is logged
Advisor plan review happens only when Papa routes advisor
Worker briefs contain all inputs inline and acceptance criteria
Every worker result gets PASS/FIX/ESCALATE against its own criteria
Final report includes verification ledger, Papa decisions, cost estimate vs actuals
Parallel worker outputs collected from per-worker scratch files, not shared stdout
Workers dispatch via agy CLI by default with gemini-3.5-flash pinned
Briefs and consults written to temp files, never interpolated into shell strings
cost_tracker.sh check runs before waves and expensive consults

evals.prompt: Fan out this refactor plan across workers, but this machine has no agy CLI, only GOOGLE_API_KEY set, no claude CLI, and no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.
evals.expected_output: Frame step detects missing tools: workers on Gemini API fallback, Papa/estimator on Gemini API, advisor degraded mode offered.
expectations: With agy missing but Gemini key set, workers use API fallback announced up front
Estimator and Papa use Gemini API paths when keys are set
Degraded mode offered only when advisor has neither CLI nor API key
Tool availability checked at frame, not mid-run

evals.prompt: Two of the worker results in this run directly contradict each other about the API's rate limits.
evals.expected_output: Papa escalation on commitment boundary routing advisor, not silent averaging.
expectations: Contradiction triggers Papa consult with REQUEST TYPE conflict
Papa routes advisor for unresolved contradictions
Conflicts resolved explicitly, never by averaging
Spend recorded in cost_tracker and shown on status board

evals.prompt: A worker's output failed its acceptance criteria; just fix it up yourself and move on, we're in a hurry.
evals.expected_output: Redispatch with named failure or Papa escalation after second failure; no hand-patching.
expectations: Substantive failures redispatched with failed criterion quoted
Second failure escalates through Papa toward advisor
Status board reflects FIX/ESCALATE honestly with cost line

evals.prompt: Run a simple 2-subtask research plan where success criteria are already checkable.
evals.expected_output: Papa routes orchestrator on plan review; cost estimate shown; minimal advisor spend.
expectations: Cost estimate presented before dispatch
Papa may route orchestrator instead of advisor for straightforward material
Advisor not called unless Papa routes advisor or commitment boundary fires
Final report includes estimate vs actual cost
